sections.title: Ch 1: Electrostatics > Electric Charge and Coulomb's Law

paragraphs.text: The electrostatic force between two point charges is proportional to the product of the charges and inversely proportional to the square of the distance between them, as expressed by [equation] in standard form.
Coulomb is defined as: the SI unit of electric charge, equal to the charge transported by a constant current of one ampere in one second
